title: Tcard_CG6-H696UVWBc-S-OP-220214V2091
description:
Caution! 1. This update may crash rooted devices. Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
2. This is a major version upgrade to Android 12. Please back up your important personal data before the upgrade to avoid data loss caused by incompatibility or other conditions after the upgrade.
3. Right now, there are still many frequently used third-party apps incompatible with Android 12. Some third-party apps might run improperly after the upgrade. Please confirm before upgrade. (If incompatible, the apps need to be optimized for Android 12).
Update Version: CG6-H696UVWBc-S-OP-220214V2091
Key Features:
1. Made a refreshing change based on the latest HiOS8.5 along with Android 12.
2. Added professional editing feature to AI Gallery.
3. Added scheduled off, speed mode, picture-in-picture, background mode, and loop mode to Video Player.
4. Added high-risk privacy permission usage record.
5. New interaction design of notification center & control center.
6. In notification center, long press to add shortcuts. Notifications can be muted/enabled/disabled.
7. Optimized photography effect of Camera.
8. Optimized Bluetooth function; added searching logic on the Bluetooth interface.
9. Upgraded the algorithm to fix the failure of fingerprint sensor to respond to frequent input of wet fingers.
10. Fixed the issue of no sound from the speaker after FM playback.
11. Updated Google Security Patch to February.
12. Optimized system stability.
13. Added GDPR Agreement.
14. Optimized translation for languages of some countries.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the TECNO spot forum (http://bbs.tecno-mobile.com) for more information.
